$comment: Public roadmap — projects/ideas Diogo plans to build but has NOT started yet (no GitHub repo). The SECOND hand-edited file (alongside overrides.json); see docs/DECISIONS.md#D11. Pure curation: there is no GitHub source to derive from, so this file IS the canonical source — validated by `npm run sync`/`npm run check`, never generated. Rules: keep it short (3-6 items), frame each by the PROBLEM it solves, never give an idea a dead repo/demo link (use `link` only for an issue/discussion). slug must be stable and must NOT collide with a live `portfolio` repo (sync warns when an idea has graduated). category -> taxonomy.categories; status -> taxonomy.roadmapStatus; horizon -> taxonomy.horizon. The two items below are SEED EXAMPLES — replace them with your real ideas.

items.title: N2 Digital Passport
items.problem: The physical Nacional 2 passport is easily damaged or lost, lacks real-time GPS stamp verification, and cannot showcase local recommendations dynamically.
items.why: A modern mobile experience to replace the physical N2 passport, letting roadtrippers log stops, view local attractions, and share their journey.

items.title: Agroturismo Mirandela Website
items.problem: Trás-os-Montes agrotourism properties lack high-quality, modern booking websites that effectively convey local culture and traditional vibes while enabling direct payment.
items.why: A fast, SEO-optimized website showcasing a Mirandela estate, regional traditions, and integrating direct bookings/payments.

items.title: Mini Golf Scorecard & Tracker
items.problem: Tracking scores during mini-golf matches with friends is tedious on paper, and there is no unified profile to keep a history of visited courses.
items.why: A gamified mobile application for logging scores, tracking visited courses, and offering future integrations/deals with local venues.
